commit.message:
MAJOR FIX: Robust email-based session handling for production

🔧 Production Session Fixes:
- Replaced unreliable session.user.id with email-based database lookups
- Fixed referral code generation by using user email as primary identifier
- Eliminated session ID dependency issues that caused 500 errors in production
- Added comprehensive user validation with database fallback

🚀 Referral System Robustness:
- GET and POST endpoints now use email -> database user lookup
- Removed session.user.id, .sub, .userId property dependencies
- Enhanced error handling with detailed logging for production debugging
- Guaranteed user resolution regardless of auth provider format

⚡ Alert Settings Production Fix:
- Removed problematic motion animations that caused hydration issues
- Simplified settings toggle with reliable state management
- Added debugging console logs for production troubleshooting
- Enhanced click handlers with proper event handling

🛡️ Database-First Approach:
- All user operations now validate against database records
- Email-based user resolution more reliable than session IDs
- Better error messages with specific failure points
- Eliminated auth provider inconsistencies

🐛 Error Resolution:
- Fixed 500 Internal Server Error for referral code generation
- Resolved Configure Alert Settings not responding to clicks
- Enhanced production error logging and debugging capabilities
- Improved session validation and fallback mechanisms

✨ Production Reliability:
- Consistent user identification across all auth providers
- Better error boundaries and graceful degradation
- Enhanced debugging output for production troubleshooting
- Improved user experience with reliable functionality

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace Samantha voice with Microsoft Ava Neural, fix word repeats

Voice: Regenerated all 44 word audio files using Microsoft's
Ava Neural voice (edge-tts) — a natural-sounding neural TTS,
replacing the robotic macOS Samantha. MP3 format cuts total
audio from 1.5MB to 404KB.

Repetition: Each syllable level now uses a shuffled queue that
drains before reshuffling. Words never repeat within a single
game, and across games in a session each word is used before
any word repeats at that syllable level.

commit.message:
Fix web favicon path and add PNG fallbacks

Favicon href was /icon/icon.svg but needs /MarkItUp/ base prefix.
Added 16px and 32px PNG fallbacks for better browser compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(counter): wire scene_map exclusion zones + tune BoTSORT tracker

Exclusion zones:
- _refresh_line() now fetches cameras.scene_map alongside count_line/detect_zone
- Extracts features with type="exclusion" (drawn in admin-mapping.js) and builds
  sv.PolygonZone list stored as self._exclusion_zones
- process() batch-evaluates all exclusion zones per frame; detections whose centroid
  lands inside any exclusion polygon are suppressed before counting/tracking logic
- Eliminates false positives from static objects (parked cars, signs, foliage)

BoTSORT tracker (botsort_traffic.yaml):
- track_buffer: 40 → 55 frames (~3.7s at 15fps); handles vehicle stops at red lights
  without ID fragmentation
- new_track_thresh: 0.40 → 0.42; raises bar to start new tracks, reduces ghost detections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(modal): show preview MP4 in modal for projects without external video

- Add native video player fallback when videoUrl is null
- Video plays muted and looped without controls
- Use object-fit: cover to fill the modal video area

Flyttade grid-klasserna direkt till StaggerReveal className.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: use JdkClientHttpRequestFactory for pfSense client connection reuse

Previously RestClient fell back to SimpleClientHttpRequestFactory (HttpURLConnection)
when trust-all-certs was disabled, causing a full TLS handshake on every request
(~900-1200ms). Now always uses JdkClientHttpRequestFactory so connections are reused.

and read-only plan/review pages with week navigation.

commit.message:
feat: mode Manager complet dans l'APK (4 onglets)

- Onglet Flotte : liste véhicules, recherche, détail, assignation chauffeur/tournée
- Onglet Incidents : liste, filtres statut, changement statut, détail avec photos
- Onglet Frais : validation carburant/nettoyage, modale détail, refus avec motif
- Onglet Carte : suivi livraisons temps réel, position chauffeur, chips tournées
- Realtime Supabase sur tous les onglets
- manager-home.tsx redirige vers les tabs (backward compat)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix false positives for Observation, choice types, and unresolvable code systems

- Implement exists discriminator for slicing (interpretation coding)
- Deep pattern matching for patternCodeableConcept (category $this)
- Resolve choice type [x] paths in non-sliced validation (effective[x])
- Evaluate FHIRPath constraints per element instance, not resource root (obs-3)
- Accept codes when terminology server can't resolve the code system
- Skip ele-1 boilerplate constraint (always true for present elements)
- Add batch validation script (validate-all.ts): 171/171 nl-core samples pass
- Add 171 nl-core sample data files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: extractJson now handles prose-wrapped JSON; add parse error log

LLM occasionally wraps the JSON in explanatory text. extractJson now
falls back to matching the outermost {...} block so parsing doesn't
fail on "where to watch X" style queries. Added console.error to log
the raw LLM response when parsing still fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch image gen to HF FLUX.1 (free) with Gemini fallback

Replace Gemini-only image pipeline with Hugging Face FLUX.1-schnell
as primary engine. Gemini quota is exhausted (limit: 0), but FLUX.1
on HF Inference API is free, fast, and high quality.

- New lib/hf-image.js: FLUX.1-schnell → SD3.5 → Gemini fallback chain
- HF returns raw JPEG bytes, converted to base64 data URLs
- Custom width/height per preset (was aspect-ratio only)
- Same brand-enhanced prompt builder and utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add purpose field for recurring payment setup and charges

- process-card: Add purpose: "SETUP_RECURRING_PAYMENT" to activate mandate
- charge-token: Add purpose: "RECURRING_PAYMENT" for token charges

Without purpose field, SumUp defaults to "CHECKOUT" which keeps mandate inactive.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
feat(badges): tiered Human Made badges with AI detection and vine fix (#1965)

* feat(badges): tiered Human Made badges, vine classification fix, and enhanced badge system

- Fix vine badge priority: original vines always show "V Original" badge,
  never "Human Made", even when proof tags are present
- Add tiered verification: Platinum (device proof + AI confirms human),
  Gold (device attestation), Silver (web crypto), Bronze (basic proof)
- Add "Hosted on Divine" badge for Divine-hosted videos without proof data
- Add "Possibly AI-Generated" warning badge for high AI scores (>=50%)
- Add moderation status service to fetch AI scan results from Divine backend
- Enhance ModerationLabelService to parse AI detection confidence metadata
  from Kind 1985 label events
- Redesign badge explanation modal to show ProofMode verification details
  and AI detection results with progress bars
- Add "Check if AI-generated" button in Not Divine Hosted popup
- Add comprehensive tests for all new badge logic and services

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(badges): update proofmode_badge_test for new tiered badge labels

Update existing tests to match new badge config: all tiers now show
"Human Made" label with verified_outlined icon, and VerificationLevel
enum now includes platinum (5 values total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(tests): enable previously skipped OriginalVineBadge test

Updated test expectations to match actual widget text ('Original'
instead of 'Original Vine') and removed skip flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: regenerate classic_vines_provider.g.dart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(tests): update tests for isOriginalVine platform-based detection

Tests were still using the old `originalLoops > 0` check to identify
vintage vines. Now that `isOriginalVine` checks `rawTags['platform']
== 'vine'`, test data needs the `['platform', 'vine']` tag.

Also adds ProviderScope with mock overrides for ProofModeBadgeRow
tests, which now reads moderationLabelServiceProvider and
videoModerationStatusServiceProvider as a ConsumerWidget.

commit.message:
Fix report detail endpoint failing on integer IDs

The get_report endpoint was validating report_id as UUID, but IDs in the
database are integers, causing "badly formed hexadecimal UUID string" errors.
Also adds proper serialization for date/UUID/JSONB fields and clears error
state on retry in the frontend.

commit.message:
Implement independent performance optimizations (#26)

## Summary

This PR implements three independent performance optimizations that fix
pre-existing inefficiencies. These changes are completely independent of
Spotify API updates and can be merged before or after PR #25.

### Changes

1. **Remove unconditional sleep from `sqlite.query_db()`** (~120s saved)
   - Removes `time.sleep(0.01)` after every SQLite commit
   - Not API-related (local CPU optimization)
- Impact: For warm-cache `update-playlists` with 12,000 tracks: ~120
seconds eliminated

2. **Write pickle cache after DB hits in Phase 1** (~150k queries
avoided)
- Added `cache_object(track)` after successful
`track.update_from_db(client)`
   - Prevents redundant album/artist DB lookups on subsequent runs
- Impact: On warm-DB/cold-pickle runs: ~150,000 redundant database
queries eliminated

3. **Cache lifecycle column check at module level** (~12k probes
eliminated)
- Module-level `_has_lifecycle_columns` flag checked once per process
instead of per track
   - Impact: Reduces from 12,000 DB probes to 1 per run

### Testing

✅ All 242 tests passing (203 unit + 39 integration)
✅ Test coverage: 73.95% overall
✅ All linting checks pass
✅ Pre-commit hooks pass

### Files Changed

- `spotfm/sqlite.py` - Removed sleep call
- `spotfm/spotify/track.py` - Added pickle cache write-back and
lifecycle column check caching

### Performance Impact

For a typical `spfm spotify update-playlists` run with ~120 playlists
and ~12,000 tracks:
- **Before**: 8+ minutes wall time
- **After optimization**: ~7 minutes wall time (conservative estimate
with all three changes)
- **Potential savings**: ~2-3 minutes from combined optimizations

### Dependencies

✅ **Independent** - Can merge before or after PR #25
- No changes to database schema
- No breaking changes
- Backward compatible

### Next Steps

PR 3 (post-batch optimizations) will build on these changes:
- snapshot_id skip for unchanged playlists (4-6 min saved per "nothing
changed" run)
- ThreadPoolExecutor for Phase 2 API fetches (parallelizes individual
track calls)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Prevent duplicate signal tracking for persistent trade setups

Skip recording to signal_tracker when an unresolved PENDING signal
already exists for the same coin/method/timeframe/direction. Setups
like order blocks and wave patterns persist for days — this ensures
one setup = one tracked result. Watchlist display is unaffected (it
uses real-time API calls, not signal_tracker).

commit.message:
feat: FHIR sync monitoring dashboard + incremental sync with dedup

Phase D: Sync monitoring dashboard at /admin/fhir-sync-monitor with aggregate
metrics, pipeline funnel, 30-day activity timeline, connection health panel,
and auto-refreshing recent runs table with error drill-down.

Phase E: Incremental sync using FHIR _since parameter + SHA-256 content hash
deduplication. Three-state dedup (new/unchanged/changed) with CDM-preserving
tracking table. Force Full Sync option bypasses _since for complete re-sync
with dedup-on-write. Split sync button with dropdown menu.

Add cold-start territory selection for first N messages before the
scoring formula takes over. Round-robin selection from curated
light-energy territories with configurable threshold via AppConfig.

- selectColdStartTerritory(): round-robin from COLD_START_TERRITORIES
- selectTerritoryWithColdStart(): gateway dispatching cold-start vs scoring
- territoryColdStartThreshold in AppConfig (default: 3)
- 14 unit tests covering round-robin, handoff, configurable threshold
